tactic: Defense Evasion, Persistence, Privilege Escalation, Initial Access
description: Adversaries may obtain and abuse credentials of existing accounts as a means of gaining access and persistence.
azure_relevance: Compromise of an Entra ID user or service principal enables broad access to Azure subscriptions.
detection_method: Entra ID sign-in logs with risk detections and impossible travel alerts.

tactic: Defense Evasion, Persistence, Privilege Escalation, Initial Access
description: Adversaries may obtain and abuse credentials of a cloud account to gain access to a cloud service.
azure_relevance: Abuse of Entra ID user or guest accounts to pivot into Azure resources.
detection_method: Entra risky user and risky sign-in alerts via Identity Protection.

description: Adversaries may use brute force techniques to gain access to accounts when passwords are unknown or hashes are obtained.
azure_relevance: Password spray campaigns against Entra ID sign-in endpoints.
detection_method: Entra sign-in logs filtered for high failed sign-in counts.

description: Adversaries may use credential stuffing to gain access to accounts using credential dumps from unrelated breaches.
azure_relevance: Automated replay of breached credentials against Entra ID.
detection_method: Defender for Identity alert on credential replay and Entra risk events.

description: Adversaries may manipulate products or delivery mechanisms prior to receipt by a final consumer.
azure_relevance: Malicious images in Azure Container Registry or compromised marketplace templates.
detection_method: Defender for Containers image scan and ARM template content inspection.

description: Adversaries may breach or abuse trusted third-party relationships to access victim networks.
azure_relevance: Abuse of partner CSP/Lighthouse delegated access or cross-tenant B2B invites.
detection_method: Entra sign-in logs filtered on cross-tenant access and delegated admin activity.

description: Adversaries may access data from cloud storage such as misconfigured object stores.
azure_relevance: Enumeration or download from Azure Blob storage due to public access or stolen SAS.
detection_method: Storage diagnostic logs and Defender for Storage anomalous access alerts.

description: Adversaries may search compromised systems to find and obtain insecurely stored credentials.
azure_relevance: Hard-coded keys in App Service settings, deployment slots, or ARM templates.
detection_method: KeyVault AuditEvent logs and GitHub secret scanning on infra repos.

description: Adversaries may search local file systems and remote file shares for files containing insecurely stored credentials.
azure_relevance: Secrets in App Service configuration files, VM disk images, or Function app settings.
detection_method: Defender for Cloud secret scanning and file integrity monitoring alerts.

description: Adversaries may attempt to position themselves between two or more networked devices to intercept traffic.
azure_relevance: Evilginx-style phishing proxies harvesting Entra ID session tokens.
detection_method: Entra Identity Protection anomalous token and unfamiliar sign-in detections.

description: Adversaries may maliciously modify components of a victim environment to hinder or disable defensive mechanisms.
azure_relevance: Disabling Defender for Cloud plans, removing diagnostic settings, or deleting Sentinel rules.
detection_method: Activity log alerts on Microsoft.Security and Microsoft.Insights operations.

description: Adversaries may modify and/or disable security tools to avoid possible detection of their malware/tools and activities.
azure_relevance: Uninstalling MDE agent or removing Defender extensions from Azure VMs.
detection_method: Defender for Endpoint tamper protection alerts and VM extension change events.

description: An adversary may disable or modify cloud logging capabilities to evade defenses.
azure_relevance: Deleting diagnostic settings or reducing activity log retention.
detection_method: Activity log alerts on diagnosticSettings delete operations.

description: Adversaries may send phishing messages to gain access to victim systems.
azure_relevance: Targeted phishing delivering Entra ID OAuth consent prompts.
detection_method: Defender for Office 365 phishing detonation and Entra consent grant auditing.

description: An adversary may attempt to discover infrastructure and resources available within a cloud environment.
azure_relevance: Unauthenticated or authenticated enumeration via ARM, az resource list.
detection_method: Activity log Reader operations at high volume from a single principal.

description: Adversaries may gather information about the victim's networks that can be used during targeting.
azure_relevance: DNS enumeration of *.azurewebsites.net and *.blob.core.windows.net subdomains.
detection_method: External attack surface management (Defender EASM) alerts.

description: Adversaries may abuse a container administration service to execute commands within a container.
azure_relevance: kubectl exec against AKS clusters or ACI container run commands.
detection_method: AKS audit logs and Defender for Containers runtime alerts.

description: Adversaries may break out of a container to gain access to the underlying host.
azure_relevance: Privileged pod abuse or hostPath mount escapes on AKS nodes.
detection_method: Defender for Containers runtime behavioral detection.

description: Adversaries may enumerate objects in cloud storage infrastructures.
azure_relevance: Listing blob containers and objects via SAS or stolen storage keys.
detection_method: Storage diagnostic logs on ListBlobs and GetContainerACL.

description: Adversaries may abuse serverless computing to execute malicious code.
azure_relevance: Deploying malicious Azure Functions or Logic Apps for persistence and execution.
detection_method: Activity log on Microsoft.Web/sites and Microsoft.Logic/workflows writes.

description: Adversaries may attempt to exploit a weakness in an internet-facing computer or program.
azure_relevance: Exploitation of unpatched App Service, API Management, or VM workloads.
detection_method: Defender for App Service and WAF alerts.

description: Adversaries may encrypt data on target systems or on large numbers of systems to interrupt availability.
azure_relevance: Ransomware encrypting Azure VM disks or storage account contents.
detection_method: Defender for Storage malware scan and VM behavioral anomaly alerts.

description: Adversaries may destroy data and files on specific systems or in large numbers to interrupt availability.
azure_relevance: Bulk delete of storage blobs, snapshots, or Key Vault secrets.
detection_method: Activity log alerts on resource delete operations and storage diagnostic logs.

description: Adversaries may use valid accounts to log into a service that accepts remote connections.
azure_relevance: RDP/SSH into Azure VMs after initial Entra compromise.
detection_method: Entra sign-in logs cross-referenced with NSG flow logs on management ports.

description: Adversaries may manipulate accounts to maintain access to victim systems.
azure_relevance: Adding credentials to service principals or resetting privileged user passwords.
detection_method: Entra audit logs on servicePrincipal and user credential operations.

description: Adversaries may modify access tokens to operate under a different user or system security context.
azure_relevance: Entra ID token replay and refresh token theft.
detection_method: Entra Identity Protection token anomaly and unfamiliar token issuance alerts.

description: Adversaries may create an account to maintain access to victim systems.
azure_relevance: Creating new Entra users or service principals for persistence.
detection_method: Entra audit logs on Add user and Add service principal events.

description: Adversaries may abuse command and script interpreters to execute commands.
azure_relevance: Azure Run Command or custom script extensions invoked on VMs.
detection_method: Activity log alerts on runCommand and VM extension installations.

description: Adversaries may perform endpoint denial of service attacks to degrade or block availability.
azure_relevance: Volumetric attacks against App Service or AKS ingress.
detection_method: Azure DDoS Protection telemetry and Front Door WAF rate limit alerts.

description: Adversaries may use alternate authentication material to move laterally within an environment and bypass normal system access controls.
azure_relevance: Pass-the-PRT and stolen refresh token reuse across Azure services.
detection_method: Entra sign-in logs correlated on tokenIssuerType and unusual client app IDs.

description: Adversaries may insert, delete, or manipulate data in order to influence external outcomes or hide activity.
azure_relevance: Tampering with Azure SQL rows or Cosmos DB documents.
detection_method: SQL auditing and Cosmos DB diagnostic logs on write operations.
